g.text: Temporal queue splitting - full system flow
Worker 1 runs with mirrord (4 queues, 2 split). Worker 2 runs normally without mirrord. Both share one Temporal.
4 queues in one worker: 2 split, 2 pass through
polls Temporal directly, operator not involved
Detailed flow per queue: real name -> becomes (virtual) -> receiver -> reply to real name
These are the mirrord-run local workers. They connect through the operator proxy, not to Temporal directly.
Anything that does not match a local worker filter stays on the cluster worker. Worker 2 is never affected.
